user.title: Connect to Umami Analytics
user.description: Enter your Umami instance details. For self-hosted, use username/password. For Umami Cloud, use your API key.

sites.title: Select websites to monitor
sites.description: Choose which Umami websites you want to track in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username/password or API key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Umami instance. Check the URL.
error.no_sites_selected: Please select at least one website.

abort.already_configured: This Umami instance is already configured.

init.title: Umami Analytics Options
init.description: Configure the time range and update interval for your Umami sensors.
